title: Version History
description: A record of how the data collection has changed over time.

version_number.title: Version Number
version_number.description: A version number for a study.
version_number.usageNotes: Every ICPSR data collection is assigned version 1.0 when it is first published. When the data collection is updated, a new version number is assigned. For substantive changes to the data collection, including changes to data files, title, or principal investigators, a new major version is created, the version number increases by 1 (for example, from 1.0 to 2.0), and a new version-specific digital object identifier (DOI) is created. For all other changes, a new minor version is created, the version number increases by 0.1 (for example, from 2.0 to 2.1), and the DOI does not change.

version_date.title: Version Date
version_date.description: The date on which a given version of a data collection was released.
version_date.usageNotes: ICPSR automatically generates this date for data collection additions and updates.

version_note.title: Version Note
version_note.description: Provenance information about a given version of the data collection.
examples: File CB3025.ALL.PDF was removed from any previous datasets and flagged as a study-level file, so that it will accompany all downloads.
The data producer provided additional data files.
The codebook descriptions of variables TANSUP, EMOSUP, and SOCSUP were corrected.

examples.version_note: The data producer provided additional data files.
